detail_reasoning.summary: The model gives the Detroit Tigers a 65% win probability. This forecast is 100% machine-learned (trained on 1467 graded games this season) and 0% matchup heuristics — the ML share grows automatically as daily results are added.

factors.text: Troy Melton holds a major FIP edge (3.91 vs 5.72), with WHIPs of 0.87 / 1.50 and K rates of 23.6% / 11.3%.
Over their last five starts the blended ERA/FIP marks are 1.76 (home) vs 4.80 (away) — a major edge in current form for the Detroit Tigers.
Bullpen Availability Scores: 53 vs 45 (quality FIP 3.96/4.73, relief IP last 3 days 17.0/7.7, closer available True/True).
Against a righty starter, the Detroit Tigers OPS split vs the Kansas City Royals split shows a slight edge for the Kansas City Royals; 14-game OPS runs 0.704 vs 0.701.
Detroit Tigers get home field at Comerica Park (park factor 98, roughly neutral). Home teams win about 53.5% of MLB games.
